title: wedelia hassleriana
intro: Wedelia hassleriana, also known as Guayacan or Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia hassleriana include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Wedelia hassleriana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
